name: Moong Dal Dosa with Tomato Chutney
source_note: Resources/Recipes/Dinner/Moong Dal Dosa with Tomato Chutney.md
description: The dish uses South Indian evening-tiffin logic: quick-cooking grains, legumes, and aromatic tempering for depth without richness. Moong Dal Dosa with Tomato Chutney brings a distinct structure, seasoning pattern, and grain-legume balance to the table.
cooking_steps: Heat a seasoned tawa on medium-high heat for 2 minutes.
Pour 120 ml batter and spread thinly. Scatter the vegetable and onion if using, then drizzle a little oil around the edge.
Cook 2 to 3 minutes on medium heat until the base is speckled brown and the top is dry.
Flip briefly if needed and serve immediately with tomato chutney.
meal_prep_notes: Batter holds 1 to 3 days depending on the base. Reheat cooked dosas only on a dry tawa for 30 to 45 seconds per side. Store chutney separately and bring it to room temperature before serving.
